title: Cheber #2268
definition:
Heber = "comrade"

 1) the Kenite, husband of Jael, who slew Sisera by driving a nail
    into his temple
 2) grandson of Asher from whom came the Heberites
 3) father of Socho, a Judahite
 4) a Benjamite
 5) another Benjamite
 6) a Gadite
nasbUsage:
Definition: Heber = "comrade"

 1) the Kenite, husband of Jael, who slew Sisera by driving a nail
    into his temple
 2) grandson of Asher from whom came the Heberites
 3) father of Socho, a Judahite
 4) a Benjamite

 6) a Gadite

    NASB:  a Kenite, also several Isr.
